notes: Monthly automated message-send allowance per business (starter 10, market 50, business 150, enterprise fair-use). One allowance shared across SMS & WhatsApp. IAP message bundles top it up (50/150/500). Automated sms/whatsapp reminder sends debit it; manual/call/printable sends do NOT. Manual deep-link sends and printable statements are unmetered. The Usage screen renders the send-allowance meter (screen-backed READ); ledger mechanics are backend-only. Allowance increases are an explicit owner decision — no scheduled lift.
